title: hypenia machrisae
intro: Hypenia machrisae is a species of flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae. It is native to Mexico and is also known as Mexican mint. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. Hypenia machrisae can be prepared as an herbal tea, oil, or tincture, and has been used to treat a range of health issues, including digestive problems, skin conditions, and respiratory infections.
